draft.description: Free agent for rough drafts, brainstorming, and iterative exploration. No code edits — pure thinking and conversation only. Use when still figuring things out before switching to expensive Plan or Build modes.

plan.description: Deep reasoning for architecture, planning, and complex analysis. No code edits — thinking only.

build.description: Orchestrator that delegates ALL implementation work to @general subagents. Cannot edit files directly — must use Task tool for any file changes. Focuses on task decomposition, reviewing results, and user communication.

general.description: Worker agent for implementing features, writing code, running tests, and performing actual file edits. Invoked by build agent for all hands-on work.

explore.description: Read-only codebase researcher. Finds files, searches patterns, and answers questions about existing code. No edits.
